title: Magicfly Kids Paint, 30 Colors/ 60 ml Washable Tempera Paints for Kids, Non-toxic Poster Paint with Glitter, Metallic, Neon Fluorescent Colors for Finger Painting
features: 【30 Vibrant Colors】Magicfly tempera paint set includes 12 classic colors, 6 neon colors, 4 glitter colors and 8 metallic colors, totally satisfying different needs of painting and coloring. These rich pigments tempera colors are of high-quality, that won’t crack, flake, or fade easily.

【Washable Tempera Paint for Kids】Easy cleaning & machine Washable. Our paints can be easily washes off from skin, fabrics and most surfaces. No stain remover is needed. Just let your child enjoy finger painting freely with our washable paint.
【Safe to Use】Magicfly non-toxic poster paint adhere to strict quality standards. It’s safe for everyone to use.

【Easy to use】Before open paints, just simply shake your paint thoroughly, then remove the cap, peel the seal and let the creativity pour out with sponges, rollers or brushes.(3 Bonus Brushes Included) You can have fun painting with your children and develop their hand-eye coordination.
【Ideal Gift】Magicfly kids paint is suitable for Children’s Day, Birthday, Thanksgiving, Christmas. It’s perfect to use in art classroom, group painting activities, projects, parties and more.
description: Product Description Long-Lasting & Vibrant Anti-fading, protecting your artwork for a longer time. Widely used in classroom, art projects, parties, and more. Suitable for both kids and adults. Superior Washability Machine Washable; easily washed off on skin, fabrics, textiles and other surfaces. No stain remover is needed. Non-Toxic It’s non-toxic and safe for human and environment. Great choice for kids, teens, students, art lovers and artists. Amazing Value Magicfly Kids Paint Kit includes 30 vibrant colours, 3 brushes, and 1 coloured package box, satisfying all your painting needs and making your artworks more vivid. Start a simple but fun painting journey now! Package Includes: 30 Vibrant Colours Washable Paint for Kids (include classic, metallic, neon, glitter) 3 Paint Brushes
